description: ADPA tier boundaries within the ICT Governance Framework single product repository.

intelligence.name: Intelligence Tier
responsibilities: Telemetry signal interpretation for template prioritization
restrictions: No execution of IaC or policy changes

orchestration.name: Orchestration Tier
responsibilities: RPAS amendment rituals and CSR baseline management
restrictions: Material changes require human decision per RPAS G1
No bypass of AMD or CSR lineage

experience.name: Experience Tier
restrictions: Governance mutations via orchestration scripts or approved APIs only
No direct writes to certified baselines

data.name: Data Tier
responsibilities: Generation manifests and telemetry-derived entity snapshots
restrictions: Entity baselines versioned; superseded records retained for audit
